'''Zhina''' was one of the original 13 [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Duskhan League]]. It was orbited by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipyard [[Black Eleven (shipyard)|Black Eleven]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]
